title: Blades-O-Brilliance
description: A simple resource pack to add a bit of elegance to the minecraft weapons.
body:
# Blades-O-Brilliance

Do you ever catch yourself thinking: minecraft weapon textures are a bit boring, or Minecraft weapons are too or not enough on the absurd side of weapon sizes?
Well weather you have or not: this is the pack for you! 
Whilst keeping the vanila feel of vanila mineraft (or not, depends on how you see it) this pack overhauls minecrafts axes and swords, compleetely transforming them into elegant armourments, fit for any enviroment.

This pack will frequently be updated as Sychon and I improve our artstiles, and creations.
All types of swords (vanila) are supported.

Compatibilities/recomended side mods:
1. Combat Amenities (back and belt slot compatibility).
2. Enchancement (Just a recomendation for better use of the scythes).
3. Advanced Netherite (Compat for all tools, pickaxe coming soon)
4. Create: stuff and additions (zinc, copper, brass, EXP, blazing, and rose quartz weapons so far, more coming soon.)
5. Enderite (swords, axes shovels and scythes.)
6. Full netter nether compatability. (Better end comming soon)
7. For fishng rods: [Big Rod Energy](https://modrinth.com/mod/big-rod-energy)

I have plans for future improvements, and/or more tools that I and Sychoni Djinn may redesign.

If you enjoy what I do, consider supporting me on Ko-fi! Every little bit means a lot https://ko-fi.com/limeimortal

If you have any suggestions for any compatability, or want to report bugs: please contact Lime_void on the Imortals Packs discord in the report bugs chat with a message containing what the bug is, and how it can be replicated. As for suggestions: first come first served, and I will highly consider adding your suggestions.

Please enjoy Blades-O-Brilliance!
